src: A classic dress with short flutter sleeves, modest neckline, a fitted bodice, defined waist, and flowing knee-length skirt. The soft fabric is lightweight, with pencil shading capturing its gentle movement.
edit: A vibrant dress with colorful floral patterns, featuring a knee-length skirt, short puffed sleeves, V-neckline, and fitted waist. The fabric has dynamic folds and patterns with various flower shades.

per_image_non_shared_src.1: A person stands with one arm slightly bent, the other hanging by their side, on a diagonally shaded textured background.
per_image_non_shared_src.2: Close-up of the person's upper body showing the dress's V-neck and puffed sleeves with cross-hatch patterns in the background.
per_image_non_shared_src.3: A person wearing a dress walks sideways in the rain, showing a profile. Background has rapid diagonal strokes of rain droplets from top right to bottom left.
per_image_non_shared_src.4: The dress is hanging on a hanger against a plain wall with diagonal shading.
per_image_non_shared_src.5: A dress arranged on a wooden chair with a softly shaded background.
per_image_non_shared_src.6: The person is walking briskly with arms swinging, hair blown back, in a sunlit flower field with high grass swayed by the wind.

per_image_non_shared_edit.1: The person is standing with one arm slightly bent and the other hanging by the side, background features diagonal lines suggesting texture.
per_image_non_shared_edit.2: close-up of the person's upper body showing the dress's V-neck and puffed sleeves, with a background of subtle cross-hatch patterns adding depth
per_image_non_shared_edit.3: A person walking sideways in the rain, in a full profile view, with the background filled with diagonal rain droplets from top right to bottom left.
per_image_non_shared_edit.4: A dress hangs on a hanger against a plain wall, with diagonal shading in the background adding texture.
per_image_non_shared_edit.5: A dress is neatly arranged on a wooden chair with a softly shaded background.
per_image_non_shared_edit.6: The person walks briskly with arms swinging, hair blown back, in a sunlit flower field with high grass swayed by wind.
